steps.title: Set up the rectangle area equation
steps.content:
The area of a rectangle equals length times width. We know the area is 57 square inches and the longest side is 19 inches. Let $w$ represent the shortest side:
$$57 = 19w$$

steps.title: Solve for the shortest side
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 19:
$$w = \frac{57}{19} = 3$$
The shortest side of the rectangle is 3 inches.
